hook: The right person should not require you to become less yourself just to stay in range.
body: Healthy fit usually asks for growth, not chronic self-erasure.
voices: The School of Life, Mark Manson

hook: When men are very attracted, they sometimes confuse adaptation with abandonment of core preferences and values.
body: Compromise is part of love; self-deletion is not. Healthy fit usually asks for growth, not chronic self-erasure.
voices: The School of Life, Mark Manson

hook: Compromise is part of love; self-deletion is not.
body: Making room for someone is healthy. Reshaping your personality to avoid disapproval is usually not.
voices: The School of Life, Mark Manson
